suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify skill discovery: Workers reported 'content-worker' skill did not exist, but it does exist at .factory/skills/content-worker/SKILL.md. Consider either: (1) Ensuring skills are discoverable at session start, or (2) Documenting the skill path convention for workers.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Features lecture9-associative-examples and lecture9-assessments both reported skill discovery failures but proceeded successfully.

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker created examples with lectureIds: [9] but sectionIds: ['l9-s1'] etc.
rejectedObservations.reason: This is the correct pattern, not an issue - reviewers confirmed examples are correctly structured.
